titleStmt.title: SII 7.251: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 251. (A.R. No. 74 of 1901). ON A SLAB SET UP IN FRONT OF THE AKKANGALA-BASTI WITHIN THE GUMMATA-BASTI AT THE SAME VILLAGE.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīmatparamagaṁbhīrasyādvādāmōgha
lāṁchanaṁ . jīyā trailōkyanāthasya śā
sanaṁ jinaśāsanaṁ . svasti śrī . jayābhyudaya śālivāhanaśaka
varṣa 1526 neya saluva śōbhakṛtu saṁvatsarada mī
namāse yeraḍaneya Ādivāradallū geyda kāryya .
śrīmaccārukīrttidēvarugaḷa priyāgraśiṣyarappa śrī
vīratiṁmarāja voḍeyarāda Ajilaru taṁma rāṇi
vāsiyarāda koṁbeṭṭiṁ baḷiya Arasakkabbeyara ku
māra pāṁḍyeppareya kumārttiyaru pāṁḍyakadēviya
rāda varddhamānakkagaḷu mallidēviyavaravarige [Ūru]
nelegoḷisida yēnūra guṁmaṭasvāmiya yeḍa
da bhāgada caṁdranāthanacaityālayada dharmmavanu
koṭṭa saṁbaṁdha . Avarugaḷu Ā bastiyanu kaṭṭisi Ā dēvara
Amṛtapaḍige biṭṭa kṣētrada vivaraveṁtaṁdoḍe . yiṁnū
rāḷavaṭṭada pāpitaḍukada bayalallu tāḷetimaru keytima
ru bāruṁbanōja mācilatimaru binoratimaru
baḷigeḷu saha gadde 12 kkaṁ bittuva bīja mūḍe 42 maja
lu beṭṭu saha gadde 13 kkaṁ bittuva bīja mūḍe 20 Aṁtu ba
yalu majalu beṭṭu saha gadde 25 kkaṁ bittuva baḷa 30 ra
lekkada mūḍe 62 yidakke gēṇi Akki ba 50 lkeda mūḍe 50
mattaṁ kukkipoḷiyallu yeḍepuṇiyalli yeḍipuṇi timma
ru Avara mēgaṇa makkigaḷu saha gadde 6 kkaṁ bittuva bījavari
mūḍe 14 beṭṭu 1 kkaṁ bīja mū 1 vubhayaṁ bailu
beṭṭu saha gadde 7 kkaṁ bīja mū 15 kkaṁ baruva Akki mū
ḍe 10 Obhayaṁ guttu 2 bayalu gadde 18 majalu be
ṭṭu saha ga 14 vubhayaṁ gadde 32 kkaṁ bittuva bīja baḷḷa 3 lekka
mū 33 kkaṁ gēṇi Akki baḷa 50 ra lkeda mūḍe 60 dīpadeṁ
ṇege siddhāya kukkipoḷiya pēraṇa majuṁbaṇiṁda
hadāra drōpatikuṁ sōmaniṁda ga 1 vutsavanene bāḷiṁ
da ga 1 . Aṁtu jana 3 riṁda ga 490 . yiṁtī dharmmanāva
nu Aḷipidavaru Ujaṁtagiriyalli sāvirataṁḍa jina
biṁbaṁgaḷa voḍada pāpakke hōguvaru . dānapālanayō
rmmadhyē pālanasyādhikaṁ phalaṁ . dānātsvarggamavāpnō
ti pālanādacyutaṁ padaṁ . varddhatāṁ jinaśāsanaṁ śrī .
Digital edition of SII 7.251 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
